title: Very thin tube made from tpu and its production process
abstract: The present invention is directed to a process for the preparation of a tube with an outer diameter in the range of from 10 Î¼m to 250 Î¼m consisting of a composition comprising a thermoplastic polyurethane as well as to a tube with an outer diameter in the range of from 10 Î¼m to 250 Î¼m consisting of a composition comprising a thermoplastic polyurethane obtained or obtainable by the process according to the invention. The invention is further directed to the use of a tube according to the invention as a tube for the transportation of a fluid or as gas membrane tube or as an elastic fiber.
claims: Claims Process for the preparation of a tube with an outer diameter in the range of from 10 Î¼ÏÎ¹ to 250 pm consisting of a composition comprising a thermoplastic polyurethane, the process comprising the steps (i) melting a thermoplastic polyurethane in an extruder at a temperature of 160Â°C to 230Â°C; (ii) to the molten thermoplastic polyurethane, adding a composition comprising a cross linker comprising isocyanate groups and mixing the resulting mixture to form a melt; (iii) extruding the melt through a spinneret heated at 180 Â°C to 230 Â°C to obtain a melt- spun elastic tube; (iv) cooling the melt spun elastic tube in a cooling section; (v) bringing the cooled melt spun elastic tube in contact with finish oil in a finishing section, the finish oil being selected from the group consisting of mineral oil and silicone oil; wherein the extruder, the cooling section and the finishing section are arranged in a vertical setting. The process according to claim 1 , wherein the tube is round. The process according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the tube has soft stretch properties. The process according to any of claims 1 to 3, wherein the spinneret has more than one opening. The process according to any of claims 1 to 4, wherein the openings are arc-like slots. The process according to any of claims 1 to 5, wherein the spinneret is heated to a temperature in the range of from 180Â°C to 230Â°C. The process according to any of claims 1 to 6, wherein the production line speed is greater than 500m/min. The process according to any of claims 1 to 7, wherein in the process 3 or more tubes are produced in parallel. The process according to any of claims 1 to 8, wherein the thermoplastic polyurethane has a shore hardness in the range of from 60A to 74D, determined according to DIN 53505. 10. The process according to any of claims 1 to 9, wherein the outer diameter of the tube is in the range of from 15 to 200 pm, preferably in the range of from 20 to 150 pm. 1 1. The process according to any of claims 1 to 10, wherein the hollow ratio of the tube is in the range of from 5 to 50%, preferably in the range of from 10 to 40%. 12. Tube with an outer diameter in the range of from 10 pm to 250 pm consisting of a composition comprising a thermoplastic polyurethane obtained or obtainable by a process according to any one of claims 1 to 1 1. 13. The tube according to claim 12, wherein the tube is round. 14. Use of a tube obtained or obtainable by a process according to any one of claims 1 to 1 1 or a tube according to claim 12 or 13 as a tube for the transportation of a fluid or as gas membrane tube or as an elastic fiber. 15. The use according to claim 12, wherein the tube has soft stretch properties.
